programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: A young couple struggles to repair a hopelessly dilapidated house

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain sets a trap by showing the N team she is defeated and also opens up a warp zone with Kevins neighborhood shown on the other side Foolishly Kevin goes through and the members of his team are captured and banished to the Black Hole Warp Zone Kevin realizes hes actually on Metroid Then he succeeds into getting back to the Palace and rescuing the N team

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget guards a priceless coin collection

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: The Hair Bears introduce Peevly to an imaginary 10-foot rabbit named Arnie to convince him that he is overworked and needs a vacation

programme.title: Hong 113
programme.desc: Hong 113

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Bullwinkle 529
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 529

programme.title: Bullwinkle 530
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 530

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Sun Hill is forced to accept the legacy of DS Beech and Meadows discovers that he is not the only one with a questionable past

programme.title: Follow The Flag
programme.desc: Follow The Flag Marine Corps Documentary Timeline

programme.title: The Underground War - Part 2
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A nurse wants the husband of her patient for herself so she delves into black magic to get rid of her patient However her plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Knight 308
programme.desc: Knight 308

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A ventriloquists dummy becomes a vessel for evil when it comes to life and demands that its master commit murder

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A distraught mother enlists the aide of a psychiatrist on a talk show to help her son whos having nightmares about Freddy Krueger Soon the doctor finds Freddys gotten inside of his head too Meanwhile a cameraman sets out to prove the existence of Krueger but he becomes a little too personally involved in his own news story

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Even during a day off at an amusement park 86 and 99 find a KAOS operation

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ runs afoul of Clearwaters power broker Jason T Rockman when he agrees to take Dr Winters and a group of her mental patients to a local carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Roger buy the contract of a professional heavyweight wrestler

programme.title: Hogans 322
programme.desc: Hogans 322

programme.title: Hogans 306
programme.desc: Hogans 306

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton refuses permission for McHale and The Crew to put on a big show to raise funds for the local Orphanage Parker uses his newly-acquired skill as a Hypnotist to make The Captain more agreeable But the scheme is complicated by the visit of a Senator from the Armed Services Committee

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Parker - A dead-ringer for an important British General - Agrees to put his life on the line by posing as The General to divert the attention of spies in New Caledonia while the real General carries out a crucial invasion of a Japanese-held island

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A gorilla steals Mrs Howells diamond brooch and while Mr Howell offers a reward to the other castaways for finding it the gorilla kidnaps Mrs Howell too

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is jealous of the Skipper when he saves Mary Ann from drowning But he may get his chance to be a hero yet when a headhunter takes the other castaways prisoner

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Fastidious actor Sterling Ames injures his back on the McCoys property and must remain on their sofa for several days much to the annoyance of cantankerous Grandpa

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa decides to turn the tables after a fast-talking shooting gallery proprietor hustles Little Luke out of 14 in proceeds from the sale of church social tickets

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: While Max and 99 host a writer who is doing a story on CONTROL for a national news magazine his assistant is a KAOS agent intent on making them look like fools

programme.title: A Bullet for Pretty Boy
programme.desc: After serving four years of a six-year sentence on a manslaughter charge a tough punk Pretty Boy Floyd escapes from prison and goes on a violent rampage

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie falls for Jack Chenault but will she move to Alaska with him Twins Judy and Joanie unhappy with marriage consider switching husbands Separated ventriloquists Mike and Pat Harmon are in the same cabin and entertain in the lounge

programme.title: WKRP 204
programme.desc: WKRP 204

programme.title: WKRP 104
programme.desc: WKRP 104

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Evan and Fontanas wedding day arrives and Marlene prepares to meet the child she put up for adoption when she was a teenager

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman discovers he has a secret admirer

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Dans love interest Christy Winters is strangled in her hotel room Her friend tries to help him solve the case and becomes the next victim Both girls were with Dan right before their murders leaving Dan badly grief-stricken

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Maurice a famous French chef and chemist has created something world-changing and wants to distribute it through Jonathans company but before he can tell Jonathan about it he is killed and his recipes stolen

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is persuaded to run for the town council

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An unknown woman saves Augur and Liam from the raids on the Resistance Lili sabotages the mother ship but Zoor stops its total destruction Lili is reportedly dead The investigation on the Presidents shooter continues

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens are forced to move their unborn infants to a refrigeration facility to save them Meanwhile Suzannes ex-husband an investigative journalist appears seeking to uncover the truth about the Blackwood project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two of Tressas friends are trapped in an invisible stealth shield developed by Dr Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: As the Alphans are planning to explore the planet Ariel a missile attaches itself to the en route Eagle Upon returning to Alpha the missile gives the Alphans a lunar atmosphere But the joy at the possibility of making a new world out of the Moon is short lived as the moon does not enter orbit around the planet or its sun and Alpha faces destruction from the newly acquired lunar air

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Millionaire CJ Holmes is determined not to allow his daughter Suzy to marry farmer Fred Andrews When Suzy appeals to the Dukes for help CJs henchmen kidnap Uncle Jesse in a last-ditch effort to stop the wedding Jesse decides to teach the millionaire a lesson about the dedication and self-sacrifice of farmers

programme.title: Hercules 203
programme.desc: Hercules 203

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Some who were detained during the Resistance sweep have not reappeared after their release Lili is taken to a lab run by Sandoval and implanted Renee tries to help Liam find the missing people

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A small-time crook runs afoul of the police and the mob; guests Tom Bosley Sheree North Barry Atwater

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Taggert a US industrialist has acquired a jade figure which has great religious significance to Kuala Rokat That nation is a small but strategically located nation which borders China Taggerts acquisition threatens to undo years of sensitive US diplomacy but there is no legal way to force him to give the figure back Phelps devises a plan which among other things calls for causing havoc with Taggerts mainframe computer Rollin impersonating an academic from Kuala Rokat and using a highly trained cat in getting the jade away from Taggert

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate an especially creepy college freshman suspected of the sniper-rifle deaths of two people for no apparent reason other than the sport of killing

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Lt Gerard agrees to work with Kimble for 24 hours to prove his innocence because someone who may have been there when his wife was killed posted bail for the one-armed man

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Everyone except Heath who has met the stranger and knows some of his exploits firsthand extends a warm welcome to the aging cowboy who killed the murderer of patriarch Tom Barkley during the Barkley-Railroad War The man as it turns out is a friend to no one Hes a sociopath and mercenary who enjoys range wars and will sell his sanguinary services to either side And hes looking for work

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne travels to a border town to join Joe Baker who has a business proposition to capture wild mustangs south of the border Joe is sick but the backer and his wife are still game Cheyenne has to worry about Indians and the wife

programme.desc: Young 314

programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Lieutenant Stone and Inspector Keller go after two insurance agents involved in the counterfeiting of an 1850 6¢ purple Guyana stamp with a value of 300000

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Brotherhood of Justice
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves Kiefer Sutherland and Billy Zane star as high-school students who start a vigilante group to combat crime in their neighborhood

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans
In a totalitarian future society Winston Smith whose daily work is re-writing history tries to rebel by falling in love

programme.title: INFORMATIVO FIN DE SEMANA
programme.desc: Porque la noticia no descansa Alejandro Sánchez nos comparte las noticias del momento los temas de coyuntura y el análisis de lo trascendente en la semana con un toque ligero que el radioescucha del fin de semana consume complementado con opciones de entretenimiento y temas de interés

programme.title: ZONA DE NOTICIAS
programme.desc: Con un toque fresco y dinámico Manuel Zamacona nos informa sobre los hechos más importantes de México y el mundo ocurridos el fin de semana en una revista noticiosa complementada con entrevistas y colaboradores sobre otros temas como deportes cine música sexualidad cultura tecnología y muchos otros más

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK investigates strange rainfalls on the Nazca Plain caused by VENOM to make the Candelabra glow in the dark and show the way to the legendary Cave of the Winters

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Simon gets shot by a love-at-first-sight arrow and falls in love with Mother Brain

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After the Computer Mind Mirror of Mother Brain says that Princess Lana is the most beautiful of them all the Eggplant Wizard makes a poison apple that will make Princess Lana fall asleep

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to find the location of MADs school for agents

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to retrieve a group of Malaysian explorers who are now MADs prisoners

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter and Turbo struggle to free Matt Nick and AJ from the pulsar generators spell

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The destabilized energy crystal has an unexpected effect on the struggle between good and evil on Gobotron

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world
